  </MeshDomains>
  <Boundary>
    <bc name="fix_dish" node_set="dish_fixed_nodes" type="zero displacement">

      <y_dof>1</y_dof>
      <z_dof>1</z_dof>
    </bc>
    <bc name="fix_cell_base" node_set="cell_base_nodes" type="zero displacement">

      <y_dof>1</y_dof>
      <z_dof>1</z_dof>
    </bc>
    <bc name="pin_nucleus" node_set="nucleus_anchor_nodes" type="zero displacement">
      <x_dof>1</x_dof>
      <y_dof>1</y_dof>
      <z_dof>1</z_dof>
    </bc>

      <y_dof>1</y_dof>
    </bc>
  </Boundary>
  <Step>
    <step id="1" name="approach">
    <Control>
      <analysis>static</analysis>
      <time_steps>10</time_steps>
      <step_size>0.1</step_size>
      <solver />
    </Control>
    <Boundary>
      <bc name="move_pipette_x_1" node_set="pipette_nodes" type="prescribed displacement">
        <dof>x</dof>
        <value>0.000000</value>
        <relative>1</relative>
      </bc>
      <bc name="move_pipette_z_1" node_set="pipette_nodes" type="prescribed displacement">
        <dof>z</dof>
        <value>-9.700000</value>
        <relative>1</relative>
      </bc>
    </Boundary>
    </step>
    <step id="2" name="hold">
    <Control>
      <analysis>static</analysis>
      <time_steps>10</time_steps>
      <step_size>0.1</step_size>
      <solver />
    </Control>
    <Boundary>
      <bc name="move_pipette_x_2" node_set="pipette_nodes" type="prescribed displacement">
        <dof>x</dof>
        <value>0.000000</value>
        <relative>1</relative>
      </bc>
      <bc name="move_pipette_z_2" node_set="pipette_nodes" type="prescribed displacement">
        <dof>z</dof>
        <value>0.000000</value>
        <relative>1</relative>
      </bc>
    </Boundary>
    </step>
    <step id="3" name="lift">
    <Control>
      <analysis>static</analysis>
      <time_steps>10</time_steps>
      <step_size>0.1</step_size>
      <solver />
    </Control>
    <Boundary>
      <bc name="move_pipette_x_3" node_set="pipette_nodes" type="prescribed displacement">
        <dof>x</dof>
        <value>0.000000</value>
        <relative>1</relative>
      </bc>
      <bc name="move_pipette_z_3" node_set="pipette_nodes" type="prescribed displacement">
        <dof>z</dof>
        <value>8.000000</value>
        <relative>1</relative>
      </bc>
    </Boundary>
    </step>
    <step id="4" name="manipulation">
    <Control>
      <analysis>static</analysis>
      <time_steps>10</time_steps>
      <step_size>0.1</step_size>
      <solver />
    </Control>
    <Boundary>
      <bc name="move_pipette_x_4" node_set="pipette_nodes" type="prescribed displacement">
        <dof>x</dof>
        <value>-4.000000</value>
        <relative>1</relative>
      </bc>
      <bc name="move_pipette_z_4" node_set="pipette_nodes" type="prescribed displacement">
        <dof>z</dof>
        <value>0.000000</value>
        <relative>1</relative>
      </bc>
    </Boundary>
    </step>
    <step id="5" name="release-test">
    <Control>
      <analysis>static</analysis>
      <time_steps>10</time_steps>
      <step_size>0.1</step_size>
      <solver />
    </Control>
    <Boundary>
      <bc name="move_pipette_x_5" node_set="pipette_nodes" type="prescribed displacement">
        <dof>x</dof>
        <value>7.000000</value>
        <relative>1</relative>
      </bc>
      <bc name="move_pipette_z_5" node_set="pipette_nodes" type="prescribed displacement">
        <dof>z</dof>
        <value>0.000000</value>
        <relative>1</relative>
      </bc>
    </Boundary>
    </step>
  </Step>
  <Output>
    <plotfile type="febio">
      <var type="displacement" />
      <var type="stress" />
      <var type="contact force" />
    </plotfile>
  </Output>
</febio_spec>

        <value>-9.700000</value>
        <relative>1</relative>
      </bc>
    </Boundary>
    </step>
    <step id="2" name="hold">
    <Control>
      <analysis>static</analysis>
      <time_steps>10</time_steps>
      <step_size>0.1</step_size>
      <solver />
    </Control>
    <Boundary>
      <bc name="move_pipette_x_2" node_set="pipette_nodes" type="prescribed displacement">
        <dof>x</dof>
        <value>0.000000</value>
        <relative>1</relative>
      </bc>
      <bc name="move_pipette_z_2" node_set="pipette_nodes" type="prescribed displacement">
        <dof>z</dof>
        <value>0.000000</value>
        <relative>1</relative>
      </bc>
    </Boundary>
    </step>
    <step id="3" name="lift">
    <Control>
      <analysis>static</analysis>
      <time_steps>10</time_steps>
      <step_size>0.1</step_size>
      <solver />
    </Control>
    <Boundary>
      <bc name="move_pipette_x_3" node_set="pipette_nodes" type="prescribed displacement">
        <dof>x</dof>
        <value>0.000000</value>
        <relative>1</relative>
      </bc>
      <bc name="move_pipette_z_3" node_set="pipette_nodes" type="prescribed displacement">
        <dof>z</dof>
        <value>8.000000</value>
        <relative>1</relative>
      </bc>
    </Boundary>
    </step>
    <step id="4" name="manipulation">
    <Control>
      <analysis>static</analysis>
      <time_steps>10</time_steps>
      <step_size>0.1</step_size>
      <solver />
    </Control>
    <Boundary>
      <bc name="move_pipette_x_4" node_set="pipette_nodes" type="prescribed displacement">
        <dof>x</dof>
        <value>-4.000000</value>
        <relative>1</relative>
      </bc>
      <bc name="move_pipette_z_4" node_set="pipette_nodes" type="prescribed displacement">
        <dof>z</dof>
        <value>0.000000</value>
        <relative>1</relative>
      </bc>
    </Boundary>
    </step>
    <step id="5" name="release-test">
    <Control>
      <analysis>static</analysis>
      <time_steps>10</time_steps>
      <step_size>0.1</step_size>
      <solver />
    </Control>
    <Boundary>
      <bc name="move_pipette_x_5" node_set="pipette_nodes" type="prescribed displacement">
        <dof>x</dof>
        <value>7.000000</value>
        <relative>1</relative>
      </bc>
      <bc name="move_pipette_z_5" node_set="pipette_nodes" type="prescribed displacement">
        <dof>z</dof>
        <value>0.000000</value>
        <relative>1</relative>
      </bc>
    </Boundary>
    </step>
  </Step>
  <Output>
    <plotfile type="febio">
      <var type="displacement" />
      <var type="stress" />
      <var type="contact force" />
    </plotfile>
  </Output>
</febio_spec>

execution.note: The in-app febio mode is still a bridge mock. The exported .feb is intended for external FEBio execution.
